Describe the sequence of interface screens shown from the start until the level begins.
canonical_answer: At 0s, the title screen appears with colorful text; at 4s, a save menu overlays the title screen; at 6s, the player selection screen shows options; at 8s, the world map loads fully; at 10s, the level start text displays clearly.

question: What is about to happen on the screen after the save slot is selected? A. A '1 PLAYER GAME' selection menu appears. B. The game transitions directly to the world map. C. The screen fades to black permanently. D. A '2 PLAYER GAME' option is automatically chosen.
